title: Expecting empty properties to be returned as null values when creating a MAGAZINE ISSUE
gherkin:
When the user creates a "MAGAZINE ISSUE" "Sieger-Typen" with the following data
  | key   | value        |
  | title | Sieger-Typen |
Then the response should contain the following properties
  | key                    | value        |
  | title                  | Sieger-Typen |
  | consecutive_number     |              |
  | issue_number           |              |
  | issue_year             |              |
  | release_date           |              |
  | single_copy_price      |              |
  | single_copy_price_unit |              |
  | pages                  |              |
